rows.text: One source of truth for page-head, page headers and compact section headers.
border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--app-border, #e2e8f0) 92%, transparent) !important;
radial-gradient(circle at top left, color-mix(in srgb, var(--color-primary, #2563eb) 10%, transparent) 0, transparent 34%),
linear-gradient(135deg, var(--app-surface-strong, #ffffff) 0%, var(--app-surface, #f8fafc) 68%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--color-primary, #2563eb) 6%, var(--app-surface, #f8fafc)) 100%) !important;
box-shadow: 0 10px 28px color-mix(in srgb, var(--app-shadow-color, rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.06)) 88%, transparent) !important;
box-shadow: 0 1px 2px color-mix(in srgb, var(--app-shadow-color, rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.06)) 70%, transparent);
intent: make page-head actions readable when a page has many buttons or long Polish labels.
border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--color-primary, #2563eb) 20%, var(--app-border, #e2e8f0)) !important;
.cf-html-view.main-clients-html .note { border-radius: 18px; padding: 14px; background: #f8fafc; border: 1px dashed #d0d5dd; color: #667085; font-size: 12px; }
HTML patterns: page-head, grid-4, search, table-card, row, right-card, statusline, progress, quick-list, mobile polish.
/* Header like HTML .page-head: no giant white card, no duplicated kicker. */
.cf-html-view.main-cases-html .note { border-radius: 18px; padding: 14px; background: #f8fafc; border: 1px dashed #d0d5dd; color: #667085; font-size: 12px; }
